issue.title: Lane refill: eliminate bigclaw-go/scripts/*.py and remaining Python automation helpers

delete_condition: Any future Python automation helper added under src/bigclaw, tests, scripts, or bigclaw-go/scripts must be deleted before merge or replaced by an existing Go/native entrypoint with matching validation evidence.

commands: find src/bigclaw tests scripts bigclaw-go/scripts -type f -name '*.py' 2>/dev/null | sort

blocker.summary: The repository-wide physical Python file count was already zero in this workspace before BIG-GO-1463 changes.

notes: This lane documents an empty remaining Python automation inventory and hardens the Go-only state with regression coverage.
The branch baseline was already Python-free, so this lane strengthens regression coverage and refreshes validation evidence rather than removing in-branch Python files.
Baseline HEAD before lane changes was `a63c8ec`.
Lane commit before push was `deb74cc41` (`BIG-GO-1463: finalize lane metadata`).
